channel.title: Vintage Story Mod DB - Latest Updates
channel.description: Newest mod releases and updates from the Vintage Story Mod DB

item.title: Launcher Mod Updater
item.description: When a world is loaded, it offers to download new updates for active mods.

item.title: Ecosystem - Flora
item.description: Making flora living

item.title: AoS | Armor Female Seraphs Compatability
item.description: Provides armor compatibility between female seraphs and various armor mods.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped Standalone
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.

item.title: Oils! Resoaped
item.description: A content mod that adds plant oils & some alternative recipes, e.g. treating hides and quicklime.

item.title: VS Director
item.description: A director camera mod for video production workflows.（导演模式模组）

item.title: C&N Alchemy
item.description: Adds potion brewing

item.title: Open Claims
item.description: GUI for claims and receive more blocks and areas to claim per hour

item.title: Still Useful Stuff
item.description: Continuation of jakecool19's' Useful Stuff.

item.title: Emotes
item.description: Adds more custom emotes to the game.

item.title: The Ultimate Mod Manager
item.description: A in-game mod manager that's suitable even for remote servers without terminal/FTP access.

item.title: Disable Random Idle Animations
item.description: Stop your character from randomly ruining serious moments

item.title: Elk Variants
item.description: Adds more varieties of tamed elk

item.title: Cheap Metal Blocks
item.description: Adds recipes for the metal blocks. 1 bit is 1 block for chiseling.

item.title: SheathsHandleTexture
item.description: Fixes sheathed weapons defaulting to brown handle color

item.title: Stone Bake Oven
item.description: You can create a Stone Bake Oven for all your large baking needs. Now with cooking pot spots!

item.title: lhgui
item.description: GUI mod for lasthearth server

item.title: Snow Melts In Water
item.description: Makes snow that falls into water melt. Adds '/snowmeltradius' command to melt any that already sunk.

item.title: Battle Towers Wilderlands Rustbound Patch
item.description: Change entities that will spawn in battle towers to Rustbound entities

item.title: RTP - Random Teleport: Reborn
item.description: Teleport to new place with your friends!

item.title: Battle Towers & Translocator Engineering Patch
item.description: Add Translocators and Linkers to the battle towers loot table

item.title: Sleeping Bag
item.description: A sleeping bag that can be worn in the waist slot. Sneak + R-click to pickup and auto-equip.

item.title: Boat Speed Tweaks
item.description: Multiply Sailboats and Rafts speed by the configured factor, separately (default for both = 2.0)

item.title: Age of Seraphs Specialized Classes
item.description: Age of Seraphs Specialized Classes Fork

item.title: Greyhaven Companions
item.description: A companion mod built for the Greyhaven SMP, part of the Mossfall Network.

item.title: Healing Malk
item.description: milk know heals you for 1 hp ૮꒰ ˶• ༝ •˶꒱ა

item.title: Seraph Atelier - Player Model Lib
item.description: Look cute while you do pottery, starve, and get hunted by horrors beyond comprehension!

item.title: Kaschperle Class Mix
item.description: A revision mix from the popular class mod Aldi classes and Agi's Classes

item.title: MoreInventorys
item.description: The mod adds new inventories for convenient and immersive storage: Shelves, crates, racks for weapon

item.title: Equus: Mustang Colors
item.description: Makes equus ferus horses look more like mustangs
